name: Chicken Mushroom Croissant Sandwich
servings: serves 6 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 22 minutes

ingredients.item: Rub the chicken breasts with black pepper and salt.
Put a suitable skillet with 2 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken for 3 minutes per side, then transfer to a plate.
Add remaining butter to the same skillet and stir in garlic, onion, and mushrooms, then sauté for 5 minutes.
Add cream cheese to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Shred the cooked chicken and add to the skillet.
Unroll the croissant dough and separate the triangles.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Spoon the chicken mixture onto the croissant dough triangles.
Roll each croissant triangle in a way to seal the filling inside.
Brush each roll with the egg wash.
Place the rolls on the baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
